title: mga mod
description:
an adventure modpack that keeps the vanilla style.
inspired by bettermc.
body:
fully **optimized**, with **shader compatibility**. has **e4mc** (to host for **free** your world!), **Simple Voice Chat** (press **.** to mute), etc.

new **biomes**, new **structures** & **dungeons**, new **mobs**, and a lot of new adventure stuff you can discover. it also has **BetterX mods**.

lots of new **decoration** stuff (**handcrafted**, **beautify**, **mrcrayfish's furniture mod: refurbished**...)

also has **xali's enhanced vanilla**, to make the game look better.

inspired by **bettermc**, by **LunaPixelStudios**. **try it out! :D** (**link:** https://modrinth.com/modpack/better-mc-fabric-bmc2)

**if you are a creator of any of the mods i used, please contact me via discord (@guishi165) if there's something up.**
